name: Goblet Squat
resistance_profile: Beginner-friendly squat holding a dumbbell at the chest.
cues: Hold the dumbbell at the chest
Elbows inside the knees at the bottom
execution_steps: Hold one dumbbell or kettlebell vertically against your chest with both hands.
Stand with feet shoulder-width and toes slightly out.
Sit straight down to full depth, letting your elbows pass inside your knees.
Drive through your whole foot to stand tall, keeping the weight at your chest.
good_when: It's a beginner's first loaded squat — the front load coaches an upright torso.
You want warm-ups or higher-rep quad work with a single dumbbell.
You're training at home with limited equipment.
bad_when: You need heavy overload — the load is capped by what you can hold at your chest.
You're advanced and chasing maximal quad tension (use a barbell or hack squat).
